requirement_topic.en: ABNORM Conformity Assessment Scope for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: ABNORM电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: ABNORM電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: ABNORM (Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité) is Burkina Faso's national standardisation and metrology body, responsible for developing and publishing Burkina Faso national standards and coordinating conformity assessment under the national quality infrastructure. ABNORM is affiliated with ISO (as a corresponding member) and with the IEC national committee network, and adopts IEC standards as technical references for electrical equipment categories. ARSE (Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie) is the energy-sector regulator and issues licences and approvals for grid-connected electrical installations including EVSE. As of 2026-06-14, a single published mandatory conformity assessment route for EV supply equipment through ABNORM (equivalent to a formal product certification scheme or mandatory CoC programme for EVSE) could not be confirmed from official published sources. Exporters must verify the current conformity assessment route, applicable national standards, HS code classification, import licensing requirements, and ARSE installation licensing with ABNORM, ARSE, local import agents, and qualified Burkinabè electrical engineers before shipment.
summary.zh: ABNORM（布基纳法索标准化、计量与质量局）是布基纳法索国家标准化和计量机构，负责制定和发布布基纳法索国家标准，以及在国家质量基础设施框架下协调合格评定。ABNORM以通讯成员身份隶属ISO，并参与IEC国家委员会网络，以IEC标准作为电气设备类别的技术参考。ARSE（能源行业监管机构）是能源行业监管机构，负责为包括EVSE在内的并网电气安装颁发许可和审批。截至2026年6月14日，未能从已发布的官方来源确认通过ABNORM对电动汽车供电设备实施的单一强制合格评定路径（相当于正式的EVSE产品认证计划或强制CoC计划）。出口商在发货前须向ABNORM、ARSE、当地进口代理商及合格的布基纳法索电气工程师核实当前合格评定路径、适用国家标准、HS编码分类、进口许可要求和ARSE安装许可。
summary.zht: ABNORM（布吉納法索標準化、計量與質量局）是布吉納法索國家標準化和計量機構，負責制定和發布布吉納法索國家標準，以及在國家質量基礎設施框架下協調合格評定。ABNORM以通訊成員身份隸屬ISO，並參與IEC國家委員會網絡，以IEC標準作為電氣設備類別的技術參考。ARSE（能源行業監管機構）是能源行業監管機構，負責為包括EVSE在內的併網電氣安裝頒發許可和審批。截至2026年6月14日，未能從已發布的官方來源確認通過ABNORM對電動汽車供電設備實施的單一強制合格評定路徑（相當於正式的EVSE產品認證計劃或強制CoC計劃）。出口商在發貨前須向ABNORM、ARSE、當地進口代理商及合格的布吉納法索電氣工程師核實當前合格評定路徑、適用國家標準、HS編碼分類、進口許可要求和ARSE安裝許可。

standards_or_laws: ABNORM (Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité) — national standards and conformity assessment body
ARSE (Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie) — energy-sector regulator, installation licensing
IEC standards adopted by ABNORM as technical references for electrical equipment
Burkina Faso customs and import licensing requirements (Direction Générale des Douanes)

summary.en: China-market EV chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC product scope. China CCC test evidence and GB/T test reports may support engineering review during ABNORM or ARSE conformity review, but do not themselves establish Burkina Faso import clearance or ARSE installation licence status. The absence of a confirmed mandatory EVSE certification scheme through ABNORM does not mean EVSE can be freely imported without any conformity or technical review — general electrical product import controls and ARSE licensing remain applicable.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023和GB/T 20234接口标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用产品范围，须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。中国CCC测试证据和GB/T测试报告可在ABNORM或ARSE合格评定审查过程中支持工程审查，但其本身不能证明布基纳法索进口清关或ARSE安装许可状态。ABNORM尚未确认强制EVSE认证计划并不意味着EVSE可以无需任何合格评定或技术审查自由进口——一般电气产品进口管控和ARSE许可仍然适用。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023和GB/T 20234接口標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用產品範圍，須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。中國CCC測試證據和GB/T測試報告可在ABNORM或ARSE合格評定審查過程中支持工程審查，但其本身不能證明布吉納法索進口清關或ARSE安裝許可狀態。ABNORM尚未確認強制EVSE認證計劃並不意味著EVSE可以無需任何合格評定或技術審查自由進口——一般電氣產品進口管控和ARSE許可仍然適用。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should: (1) contact ABNORM directly to determine the current conformity assessment route and applicable national standards for EV supply equipment before shipment; (2) engage ARSE for installation licensing requirements and confirm whether an EVSE-specific technical regulation has been issued since 2026-06-14; (3) engage a local Burkina Faso import agent and qualified electrical engineer to confirm HS code classification, import duties, technical review requirements, and site commissioning obligations; (4) prepare IEC 61851-based safety and EMC evidence, IEC 62196 connector documentation, French-language labelling and manuals, and SONABEL grid-connection documentation as the baseline technical package, regardless of whether a formal ABNORM CoC is confirmed as mandatory; (5) note that most EV charging projects in Burkina Faso are likely to be donor-funded (EU, AFD, World Bank, or similar) and will specify their own technical standards and conformity requirements, typically referencing IEC standards — review the specific project specification before procurement.
gap.zh: 出口商应：(1) 在发货前直接联系ABNORM，确认电动汽车供电设备的当前合格评定路径和适用国家标准；(2) 与ARSE协商安装许可要求，确认自2026年6月14日以来是否已发布EVSE专项技术法规；(3) 聘请布基纳法索当地进口代理商和合格电气工程师，确认HS编码分类、进口关税、技术审查要求和现场调试义务；(4) 无论ABNORM CoC强制性是否确认，均应准备基于IEC 61851的安全和EMC证据、IEC 62196接口文件、法语标签和说明书，以及SONABEL并网文件，作为基线技术资料包；(5) 注意布基纳法索大多数电动汽车充电项目很可能由捐助方资助（欧盟、法国开发署、世界银行或类似机构），并将指定自己的技术标准和合格评定要求（通常参照IEC标准）——采购前须审查具体项目规范。
gap.zht: 出口商應：(1) 在發貨前直接聯繫ABNORM，確認電動汽車供電設備的當前合格評定路徑和適用國家標準；(2) 與ARSE協商安裝許可要求，確認自2026年6月14日以來是否已發布EVSE專項技術法規；(3) 聘請布吉納法索當地進口代理商和合格電氣工程師，確認HS編碼分類、進口關稅、技術審查要求和現場調試義務；(4) 無論ABNORM CoC強制性是否確認，均應準備基於IEC 61851的安全和EMC證據、IEC 62196接口文件、法語標籤和說明書，以及SONABEL併網文件，作為基線技術資料包；(5) 注意布吉納法索大多數電動汽車充電項目很可能由捐助方資助（歐盟、法國開發署、世界銀行或類似機構），並將指定自己的技術標準和合格評定要求（通常參照IEC標準）——採購前須審查具體項目規範。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — ABNORM mandatory EVSE CoC route could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; ARSE installation licensing is mandatory for grid-connected EVSE; donor-funded project specifications typically impose IEC-based conformity requirements independently; general electrical product import controls remain applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence is not an ABNORM conformity substitute

source.publisher: ABNORM — Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Burkina Faso market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify the ABNORM conformity route and ARSE installation licensing for the specific product with local partners before shipment. Most Burkina Faso EV charging projects will be donor-funded and will specify IEC-based conformity requirements independently — review project specifications carefully.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足布基纳法索市场准入。在发货前应与当地合作方核实具体产品的ABNORM合格评定路径和ARSE安装许可。布基纳法索大多数电动汽车充电项目将由捐助方资助，并将独立指定基于IEC的合格评定要求——应仔细审查项目规范。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足布吉納法索市場准入。在發貨前應與當地合作方核實具體產品的ABNORM合格評定路徑和ARSE安裝許可。布吉納法索大多數電動汽車充電項目將由捐助方資助，並將獨立指定基於IEC的合格評定要求——應仔細審查項目規範。

requirement_topic.en: Burkina Faso EV Market Context — Nascent Market, Electricity Deficit, and 2/3-Wheeler Priority
requirement_topic.zh: 布基纳法索电动汽车市场背景——初级市场、电力短缺与两/三轮电动车优先
requirement_topic.zht: 布吉納法索電動汽車市場背景——初級市場、電力短缺與兩/三輪電動車優先

summary.en: Burkina Faso's EV market is at an extremely early stage as of 2026. The 4-wheel EV fleet is negligible; e-mobility activity is concentrated in 2-wheel and 3-wheel electric vehicles (motocycles électriques, tricycles), which are more relevant to the current market. National electricity access is estimated at below 20% of the total population, with severe urban–rural disparity; SONABEL's generation capacity is chronically insufficient and load-shedding (délestage) is routine even in Ouagadougou. These structural conditions mean that: (a) the practical demand for 4-wheel AC/DC EVSE from the existing vehicle fleet is negligible; (b) high-power DC fast charger projects cannot be supported by the grid at most sites; (c) any EVSE deployment is a pilot, donor-funded, or fleet-operator project rather than a commercial rollout; (d) off-grid solar-plus-storage paired with low-power AC charging represents the most feasible deployment model in many locations; (e) 2/3-wheel charging infrastructure — simpler, lower-power, and compatible with partial-electrification settings — deserves separate technical and regulatory analysis. The security situation in Burkina Faso (ongoing conflict in parts of the country as of 2026) adds operational risk and may restrict site options for any infrastructure project. Exporters should apply realistic expectations and engage in-country partners with direct knowledge of the operating environment before committing to any Burkina Faso EV charging project.
summary.zh: 截至2026年，布基纳法索电动汽车市场处于极为初期阶段。四轮电动汽车保有量可忽略不计；电动出行活动集中于两轮和三轮电动车（电动摩托车、电动三轮车），这是当前市场更具相关性的细分领域。全国电力普及率估计不足总人口的20%，城乡差距严重；SONABEL发电容量长期不足，即使在瓦加杜古也频繁实施限供（délestage）。上述结构性条件意味着：(a) 现有车辆保有量对四轮交流/直流EVSE的实际需求可忽略不计；(b) 高功率直流快充项目在大多数站点无法获得电网支撑；(c) 任何EVSE部署均属试点、捐助方资助或车队运营商项目，而非商业推广；(d) 太阳能加储能与低功率交流充电组合的离网模式是许多地点最可行的部署方案；(e) 两/三轮充电基础设施——更简单、功率更低、兼容部分电气化环境——需要单独进行技术和监管分析。布基纳法索的安全形势（截至2026年该国部分地区持续存在冲突）增加了运营风险，可能限制任何基础设施项目的选址。出口商应保持切实的预期，并在承接任何布基纳法索电动汽车充电项目前，与直接了解当地运营环境的国内合作方接洽。
summary.zht: 截至2026年，布吉納法索電動汽車市場處於極為初期階段。四輪電動汽車保有量可忽略不計；電動出行活動集中於兩輪和三輪電動車（電動摩托車、電動三輪車），這是當前市場更具相關性的細分領域。全國電力普及率估計不足總人口的20%，城鄉差距嚴重；SONABEL發電容量長期不足，即使在瓦加杜古也頻繁實施限供（délestage）。上述結構性條件意味著：(a) 現有車輛保有量對四輪交流/直流EVSE的實際需求可忽略不計；(b) 高功率直流快充項目在大多數站點無法獲得電網支撐；(c) 任何EVSE部署均屬試點、捐助方資助或車隊運營商項目，而非商業推廣；(d) 太陽能加儲能與低功率交流充電組合的離網模式是許多地點最可行的部署方案；(e) 兩/三輪充電基礎設施——更簡單、功率更低、兼容部分電氣化環境——需要單獨進行技術和監管分析。布吉納法索的安全形勢（截至2026年該國部分地區持續存在衝突）增加了運營風險，可能限制任何基礎設施項目的選址。出口商應保持切實的預期，並在承接任何布吉納法索電動汽車充電項目前，與直接了解當地運營環境的國內合作方接洽。

standards_or_laws: SONABEL (Société Nationale Burkinabè d'Électricité) — national electricity supply constraints and electrification data
ARSE (Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie) — energy sector regulatory framework
Burkina Faso Politique Énergétique Nationale — national energy policy framework
ECOWAS (Economic Community of West African States) regional energy policy context

summary.en: China's domestic EV infrastructure expansion under the New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan (2021–2035) operates in a context of high and growing EV fleet density, near-universal urban grid electrification, stable 220/380 V supply, and an established CPO ecosystem. This operational context is fundamentally different from Burkina Faso. Chinese EV charger manufacturers with export capability face a genuine market development challenge in Burkina Faso: the demand pipeline is small, financing is predominantly donor-driven, specifications will be IEC-based, connector redesign is required, and climate/grid derating adds to costs. A project-by-project approach working with donor-funded programmes is more viable than a distributor-led commercial rollout.
summary.zh: 中国国内在《新能源汽车产业发展规划（2021—2035年）》框架下的电动汽车基础设施扩张，运作于电动汽车保有量高且持续增长、城市电网几乎全面电气化、220/380 V供电稳定、充电点运营商（CPO）生态系统成熟的背景下。这一运营背景与布基纳法索存在根本性差异。具备出口能力的中国电动汽车充电桩制造商在布基纳法索面临真实的市场开发挑战：需求来源有限、融资主要依赖捐助方驱动、规范将基于IEC、接口重新设计不可避免，气候/电网降额进一步增加成本。与经销商主导的商业推广相比，配合捐助方资助项目逐项目推进是更可行的路径。
summary.zht: 中國國內在《新能源汽車產業發展規劃（2021—2035年）》框架下的電動汽車基礎設施擴張，運作於電動汽車保有量高且持續增長、城市電網幾乎全面電氣化、220/380 V供電穩定、充電點運營商（CPO）生態系統成熟的背景下。這一運營背景與布吉納法索存在根本性差異。具備出口能力的中國電動汽車充電樁製造商在布吉納法索面臨真實的市場開發挑戰：需求來源有限、融資主要依賴捐助方驅動、規範將基於IEC、接口重新設計不可避免，氣候/電網降額進一步增加成本。與經銷商主導的商業推廣相比，配合捐助方資助項目逐項目推進是更可行的路徑。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: The primary market-access gap for Burkina Faso is not a missing certification route but a fundamental mismatch between Chinese EVSE product design assumptions (high fleet density, stable urban grid, GB/T connector ecosystem) and Burkina Faso's market reality (negligible 4-wheel EV fleet, chronic power deficits, IEC connector alignment, French documentation requirement, donor-project procurement). Chinese exporters considering Burkina Faso should: (1) target donor-funded programmes (EU Energy Facility, AFD, World Bank ECOWAS Energy Access) rather than commercial distributor channels; (2) prepare IEC 62196-connector products with OCPP firmware and French documentation specifically; (3) include solar-storage integration capability for off-grid or hybrid-grid deployments; (4) work with a Ouagadougou-based technical partner for site surveys, SONABEL liaison, ARSE licensing, and commissioning; (5) scope the 2/3-wheel charging market separately — it has different standards, power levels, and infrastructure models.
gap.zh: 布基纳法索市场准入的主要差距不是缺失的认证路径，而是中国EVSE产品设计假设（高保有量、稳定城市电网、GB/T接口体系）与布基纳法索市场现实（四轮电动汽车保有量可忽略、长期电力短缺、IEC接口对接、法语文件要求、捐助项目采购）之间的根本错位。考虑进入布基纳法索的中国出口商应：(1) 以捐助方资助项目（欧盟能源基金、法国开发署、世界银行ECOWAS能源普及计划）为目标，而非商业经销商渠道；(2) 专门准备配备OCPP固件和法语文件的IEC 62196接口产品；(3) 具备太阳能储能集成能力，以满足离网或混合电网部署需求；(4) 与瓦加杜古本地技术合作方合作，负责现场勘测、SONABEL联络、ARSE许可和调试；(5) 单独评估两/三轮充电市场——该细分市场采用不同的标准、功率等级和基础设施模式。
gap.zht: 布吉納法索市場准入的主要差距不是缺失的認證路徑，而是中國EVSE產品設計假設（高保有量、穩定城市電網、GB/T接口體系）與布吉納法索市場現實（四輪電動汽車保有量可忽略、長期電力短缺、IEC接口對接、法語文件要求、捐助項目採購）之間的根本錯位。考慮進入布吉納法索的中國出口商應：(1) 以捐助方資助項目（歐盟能源基金、法國開發署、世界銀行ECOWAS能源普及計劃）為目標，而非商業經銷商渠道；(2) 專門準備配備OCPP固件和法語文件的IEC 62196接口產品；(3) 具備太陽能儲能集成能力，以滿足離網或混合電網部署需求；(4) 與瓦加杜古本地技術合作方合作，負責現場勘測、SONABEL聯絡、ARSE許可和調試；(5) 單獨評估兩/三輪充電市場——該細分市場採用不同的標準、功率等級和基礎設施模式。

mandatory_status.target: Market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical, conformity, grid-connection, and donor-programme requirements remain applicable independently; honest assessment of market feasibility is critical before project commitment
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV policy and domestic market scale do not affect Burkina Faso conformity obligations or market feasibility

source.publisher: ARSE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie, Burkina Faso

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Burkina Faso's EV market is extremely nascent and structurally constrained by chronic electricity deficits and very low electrification rates. 4-wheel EVSE deployment is realistically a donor-funded pilot segment. Chinese exporters should not project Chinese domestic market demand onto Burkina Faso; the primary near-term e-mobility opportunity is the 2/3-wheel segment. Any 4-wheel EVSE project requires early engagement with SONABEL, ARSE, and a local technical partner.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 布基纳法索电动汽车市场极为初级，受长期电力短缺和极低电气化率的结构性制约。四轮EVSE部署现实上属于捐助方资助的试点细分领域。中国出口商不应将中国国内市场需求投射至布基纳法索；近期主要的电动出行机会在两/三轮细分市场。任何四轮EVSE项目都须尽早与SONABEL、ARSE和当地技术合作方接触。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 布吉納法索電動汽車市場極為初級，受長期電力短缺和極低電氣化率的結構性制約。四輪EVSE部署現實上屬於捐助方資助的試點細分領域。中國出口商不應將中國國內市場需求投射至布吉納法索；近期主要的電動出行機會在兩/三輪細分市場。任何四輪EVSE項目都須盡早與SONABEL、ARSE和當地技術合作方接觸。
